hypothesis: Static Agent Skill evidence can be produced reproducibly without executing artifact content
success_metric: Pinned public skill and hostile fixtures yield independently reviewed receipts
failure_metric: Any execution path escape hidden partial coverage nondeterminism or seeded-risk miss
constraints: Controlled public or synthetic inputs; no external intake or execution
result: 34 tests passed and one privilege skip at original checkpoint; independent local review passed
decision: Accept bounded local evidence without inferring external safety or demand

hypothesis: A diverse public Stage A catalog can be built autonomously without uploads or artifact execution
segment: Machine clients and Agent Skill source repositories
success_metric: At least 25 skills from at least 10 repository-owner namespaces; exact commits/digests; signed receipts; zero hidden skips
failure_metric: Fewer than 25 or 10 owner namespaces; signature/source mismatch; execution; private/upload intake; hidden skip
constraints: Public selected sources only; no original artifact files archives or executable payloads; bounded metadata/excerpts; no execution
result: 25 receipts; 12 repository-owner namespaces with identity/independence unverified; 19 structural pass; 6 explicit structural fail; 0 skipped; DSSE/Ed25519; signed index; root-signed lifecycle sequence 2; 53 tests pass and 1 privilege skip; P0-P2 review closed
decision: Accept local Stage A candidate; do not call REST/MCP live or demand validated

hypothesis: External machines will retrieve repeat and pay for exact-version evidence without human sales or routine fulfillment
segment: Agent Skill tooling publishers and automated callers
offer: Free retrieval plus micropriced comparison/fresh validation/signed issuance
channel: Live read-only REST MCP and publisher CI
success_metric: 10 legitimate external requests including 3 repeats; 1 external CI; 1 genuine settled machine-paid request; cost recorded
failure_metric: Security boundary failure false label no repeat usage no genuine settlement or manual routine fulfillment
constraints: No uploads private artifacts calls demos or manual job approval; quote before payment
